name: Sensys Gatso Group AB (publ)
summary: Sensys Gatso Group AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, develops, produces, markets, and sells traffic safety systems and solutions to nations, cities, and fleet owners worldwide. It operates through two segments, Systems Sales and Managed Services. The company's products include red-light and speed enforcement systems, fixed and mobile speed enforcement systems, speed warning safety systems, and back office solutions, as well as automatic number plate recognition cameras for tolling, police mobile units, surveillance, section control speed enforcement, access control, weigh-in-motion identification, and other industrial applications. It also provides access control solutions for traffic management applications, including city center restricted zones, dedicated lanes, urban congestion control, low emission zones, and cut-through routes. In addition, the company offers sustainable city, managed highway, and safe rural road solutions; Traffic Enforcement as a Service; and project management, maintenance, and software development services. The company's products are primarily used for speed enforcement, red-light enforcement, automatic license plate recognition, environmental zones, and safety zones enforcement. It serves police and road authorities, and private operators directly, as well as through partners, agents, and distributors. The company was formerly known as Sensys Traffic AB.
